title: ePIANNO: ePIgenomics ANNOtation tool.
author: Liu CH Ho BC Chen CL Chang YH Hsu YC Li YC Yuan SS Huang YH Chang CS Li KC Chen HY
content: S-EPMC4747527 PMC4747527 ePIANNO: ePIgenomics ANNOtation tool. Recently, with the development of next generation sequencing (NGS), the combination of chromatin immunoprecipitation (ChIP) and NGS, namely ChIP-seq, has become a powerful technique to capture potential genomic binding sites
